reasoning: MIXED ribbon (12¢ spread) limits conviction, but price sits 114¢ above all three EMAs (fast 683.48, pivot 683.36, slow 683.47), a decisively bullish positioning. Last 3 bars all green: 15:45 (green, 52¢ moderate body, 54K vol), 15:50 (green, 13¢ small body), 15:55 (green, 56¢ strong body, 109.6K volume spike at end-of-day close). Final bar's massive volume (109.6K vs 35.8K prior) and strong body (60% of range) confirm bullish conviction into overnight. VIX falling 6.95%, IV regime MID. Overnight gap flat. Marginal bullish edge: price well above pivot + unanimous 3-bar green structure + volume confirmation override the MIXED ribbon ambiguity.
